title: Beyond-Globe
description: This is a modpack that hopes to enhance the Big Globe mod. This modpack includes various accessibility features such as, step height and gliders. As well as many optimisation mods.
body:
# **Disclaimer**
This modpack was designed with the full intent to enhance the player experience and does not aim to overhaul the [Big Globe](https://modrinth.com/mod/big-globe) mode in any way. This modpack is simply designed to optimise everything around the Big Globe mod so that it might be more enjoyable for the player.

# **Description**
This modpack adds the Step Accessibility mod to allow the player to better traverse the world in the early game. For mid game exploration this modpack presents the user with the Hang Glider mod so they can expedite travels. For late game this modpack offers the user a more travel options through the Waystones mod. End game elytra are tweaked through the DoABarrelRoll mod to enhance immersion. Finally this modpack adds complementary mods like Distant Horizons and Fresh Animations.

The test world offered in the modpack is generated using the datapack currently unavaliable on modrinth, When Dungeons Arise.

In conclusion, this mod is perfect for any minecraft player tired of the vanilla terrain generation but doesn't want to overcrowed their minecraft experience with dozens of mods just to experience a new terrain.
